code:
import io
import string
import list

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut current = ""

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(current)
      match string.parse_int(current)
      when Some(v)
        nums = list.push(nums, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
      current = ""
    end
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut reversed: List<Int> = []
mut j = list.len(nums) - 1
while j >= 0
  match list.get(nums, j)
  when Some(v)
    reversed = list.push(reversed, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j - 1
end

mut output = ""
mut k = 0
let m = list.len(reversed)
while k < m
  match list.get(reversed, k)
  when Some(v)
    if k == 0
      output = "#{v}"
    else
      output = "#{output} #{v}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  k = k + 1
end

println(output)
